task: Answer Day 1 RAG definition questions instead of rejecting them as out of scope

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing answer changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Classified RAG, source-checking, hallucination, and prompt terms as EDU AI training scope instead of out_of_scope.
Added a direct RAG definition answer to the safety coach fallback and fast-template path.
Allowed safety coach event stage values matching dayN so Day 2 and later questions are not forced into day0.
Added regression coverage for the exact question '그런데 RAG가 뭐야?'.
